model_status: INTEGRATED PRIOR-ONLY / NOT PHYSICALLY CALIBRATED; PHYSICAL BACK NET ONLY

shot_profile.name: low_spin
shot_profile.description: centred, yaw-aligned instep strike producing a low-spin goal; the coherent knuckle wake is active but small at this ground-shot speed
shot_profile.evidence_status: INTEGRATED ISAAC PASS / LOW-SPIN KNUCKLE-READY PRIOR / NOT A VALIDATED HIGH-SPEED KNUCKLEBALL
shot_profile.causality_contract: profile selects only robot spawn and actuator-command targets; outgoing ball pose, velocity, spin, flight, and task result are never prescribed

causal_chain: live G1 operational-response tensor + two-way pressure-shell impulse
known_integration_gap: Roof and side net cords remain visual-only. Simultaneous custom contacts exchange their integrated wrenches through the canonical 2 ms PhysX boundary; a partitioned-coupling rate sweep remains open.
task_success_definition: A causal whole-ball goal plus contact/filter, energy, finite-state, and humanoid recovery invariants. Back-net contact is not required: a physically valid ground shot may stop inside the goal mouth.

asset_audit.model_status: DECLARED SIMULATION ROBOT / HARDWARE REVISION OPEN

discrepancies.public: G1 or configurable G1 EDU (23--43 DoF)
discrepancies.consequence: No hardware-transfer claim until serial/configuration and inertial audit exist.
Use bounded simulation limits and report them; do not call 139 Nm a hardware value.

discrepancies.local: four 5 mm sole spheres per ankle-roll link
discrepancies.consequence: P4 uses a separately audited foot-patch proxy aligned to the visible STL.

stationkeeping_reanchor.semantics: change only the high-level locomotion command after the kick; no simulator state write

separation_observables.lateral_residual_scope: all post-separation forces and contacts; not attributed to Magnus alone

post_separation_aerodynamic_extrema.scope: from first resolved foot separation through episode end

goal_crossing.reason: whole ball crossed inside the opening

patch.evidence_status: PINNED VISIBLE-STL CONVEX-HULL CONTACT PROXY / CONVEXITY FILLS MESH CONCAVITIES / ISOTROPIC MASS FALLBACK PRIOR / NOT HARDWARE-CALIBRATED

contact_geometry.model_status: CONVEX HULL OF PINNED VISIBLE STL / MESH-FAITHFUL OUTER PROXY / NOT EXACT CONCAVE SURFACE / NOT HARDWARE-CALIBRATED

source.units: metres inherited from pinned Unitree asset

contact_geometry.runtime_query: exact closest point with nearest-vertex upper bound and triangle-AABB lower-bound pruning; no OBB narrow-phase substitution or distance threshold

operational_response_sources: live PhysX generalized mass matrix and body Jacobians

subcycle_energy_audit.scope: local constant-W contact substeps; outer PhysX boundary and actuator work are excluded

partitioned_release_hysteresis.release_condition: after internal indentation reaches zero, live outer-step geometry must separate before a later re-impact

net_coupling.model_status: OPEN NET-SPECIMEN PRIOR / NOT DYNAMICALLY CALIBRATED

native_robot_ball_filter.reason: the audited custom foot proxy exclusively owns robot--ball contact; native robot colliders cannot duplicate or bypass it

ball_visual_deformation.model_status: REDUCED VISUAL MODE / PRIOR-ONLY / NOT SHELL FEA

actuator_limits.effort_limit_source: audited URDF limits capped at public G1 EDU 120 N m maximum
